title: The OH offers crypto-native add-ons: exchange setup, banking, off-ramp, AML monitoring, and payment controls.
content:
The Operational Hub provides crypto-native financial infrastructure as add-on services:

**Setup services:**
- Exchange account setup (Kraken, Coinbase, Binance, Bitfinex, Crypto.com, Nexo)
- Crypto-friendly bank setup
- Payment provider & off-ramp setup for fiat conversion
- EOR/PEO setup for local payroll providers

**Ongoing compliance:**
- Payment controls & reconciliation — crypto payments requiring second-party approval based on invoices
- AML monitoring & compliance reporting — regular checks on contractors/clients for sanctions, PEP status; wallet risk assessment
- Supplier & partner liaison — maintaining accounts with EORs/PEOs to reduce offboarding risk
- Invoice compliance review — ensuring invoices meet local law requirements before payment
- Card & spend operations — monitoring connected accounts, creating cards/users, flagging restricted transactions
- Contractor documentation support — income/affiliation docs for visas, loans
- Legal counsel advice — 5 hours of Swiss counsel included

Multi-currency payouts support USD, GBP, EUR, CHF, and DKK with 48-hour transfers. Additional currencies available on request.
description: Crypto-to-fiat infrastructure: Kraken/Coinbase/Binance setup, crypto-friendly banking, AML monitoring, and 48h multi-currency payouts.
